mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_background_shell_task (task_id, run_id, conversation_id, workspace, command, cwd, launch_mode, timeout_ms, pid, status, exit_code, error_code, error_message, stdout_file, stderr_file, stdout_bytes, stderr_bytes, started_at, completed_at, completion_notified) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{runId}, #{conversationId}, #{workspace}, #{command}, #{cwd}, #{launchMode}, #{timeoutMs}, #{pid}, #{status}, #{exitCode}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{stdoutFile}, #{stderrFile}, #{stdoutBytes}, #{stderrBytes}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{completionNotified}) ON CONFLICT(task_id) DO UPDATE SET run_id = excluded.run_id, conversation_id = excluded.conversation_id, workspace = excluded.workspace, command = excluded.command, cwd = excluded.cwd, launch_mode = excluded.launch_mode, timeout_ms = excluded.timeout_ms, pid = excluded.pid, status = excluded.status, exit_code = excluded.exit_code, error_code = excluded.error_code, error_message = excluded.error_message, stdout_file = excluded.stdout_file, stderr_file = excluded.stderr_file, stdout_bytes = excluded.stdout_bytes, stderr_bytes = excluded.stderr_bytes, started_at = excluded.started_at, completed_at = excluded.completed_at, completion_notified = excluded.completion_notified, update_time = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_background_shell_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM agent_background_shell_task WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM agent_background_shell_task WHERE run_id = #{runId} AND status IN ('STARTING', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_background_shell_task SET completion_notified = 1, update_time = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND completion_notified = 0
